name: Invoice Exception Intelligence Layer
business_problem: Analysts spend too much time sorting invoice exceptions before routing them for resolution
current_workflow: Invoice matching exception triage and escalation
proposed_ai_role: Sense invoice exceptions interpret root cause recommend routing and learn from resolution outcomes
affected_users: Accounts payable analysts and vendor managers
value_claim: Reduce exception triage time by 25 percent
notes: Needs human approval before customer or vendor communication

name: Executive Meeting Summary Bot
current_workflow: Meeting notes action capture and follow-up tracking
proposed_ai_role: Summarize meetings extract decisions and draft action lists
notes: May overlap with existing transcript features

name: Customer Churn Predictor
business_problem: Retention team wants earlier warning signs for churn
current_workflow: Customer health review and renewal prioritization
proposed_ai_role: Predict churn risk and recommend next-best retention actions
affected_users: CSMs revenue leaders and account teams
existing_tools: CRM support tickets product usage exports
notes: No baseline or labeled outcome data yet

name: Policy Q&A Assistant
business_problem: Employees ask repeated policy questions across multiple channels
current_workflow: Employee policy support and HR service requests
proposed_ai_role: Answer policy questions from approved documents with citations
affected_users: Employees HR operations and people managers
notes: Needs source citation escalation path and answer confidence threshold

name: Sales Deck Generator
business_problem: Sellers spend time assembling generic decks
current_workflow: Sales collateral preparation and account research
proposed_ai_role: Generate account-specific first drafts from approved content
affected_users: Sellers sales managers and enablement leads
notes: Value depends on content quality brand controls and human review

name: AI Strategy Dashboard
business_problem: Executives want visibility into AI activity
proposed_ai_role: Create dashboard and narrative summary of AI initiatives
notes: Problem is governance design more than AI

name: Contract Redline Agent
business_problem: Legal review turnaround is slow for customer contracts
current_workflow: Contract review redline drafting and risk escalation
proposed_ai_role: Recommend redlines and risk notes from clause library
affected_users: Legal operations attorneys and sales teams
notes: Requires legal approval high control maturity and audit trail

name: Product Feedback Synthesizer
business_problem: Feedback is scattered across calls tickets and notes
current_workflow: Research synthesis theme extraction and roadmap evidence review
proposed_ai_role: Cluster themes cite examples and identify decision implications
affected_users: Product managers UX research and support leaders
existing_tools: CRM tickets call notes research repository
notes: Good candidate for bounded synthesis pilot

name: Field Service Scheduling Agent
business_problem: Manual scheduling creates avoidable technician travel and missed priority calls
current_workflow: Dispatch planning exception handling and schedule adjustment
proposed_ai_role: Recommend schedule changes and flag conflicts
value_claim: Reduce travel waste and missed SLA risk
notes: Orchestration and risk controls are more important than text generation

name: AI Vendor Intake Screener
business_problem: Teams bring AI vendor requests before use case and risk are clear
proposed_ai_role: Decompose vendor proposals into use case risk data and proof requirements
affected_users: Procurement security legal and business sponsors
existing_tools: Intake form vendor decks security questionnaire
notes: Strong fit for this operating system as a meta-use case
